note: Verified against the 11e Aeldari faction pack and library source: both list exactly seven Aspect Warrior squads; Shining Spears is in neither.
suggestion: Shining Spears show an Aspect Shrine Token ability they should not have

note: The 11e clone kept only the pointer paragraph and dropped the section it points at. Restored all three canticles from source.
suggestion: Canticles of the Omnissiah is missing its rules text

note: Rule permits stacking; a missing space in the source text ('havealready') stopped the clause parsing. Data typo fixed and parser widened.
suggestion: Cannot attach a Datasmith to a Kastelan Robots unit that already has one

note: All four correct. Doctrines change BS/WS characteristics (so [HEAVY] stacks); Conqueror AP applies to shooting; Auto-Divinatory sets BS 3+. Cawl re-roll aura added.
suggestion: Four errors in how the Doctrina Imperatives and Auto-Divinatory Targeting are modelled

note: Unlock lives in the MFM 'LEADER: KOMMANDOS' line, not the rules text. Prompted a full MFM audit that found five further missing leader unlocks.
suggestion: Slippery Git should let its bearer lead Kommandos

note: Export is correct (two entries, A3 ranged / A4 melee); the merge happens in a third-party table mod. Did surface a genuine double-count elsewhere, which was fixed.
suggestion: A weapon with both a melee and a ranged profile is stacked into one entry

note: Correctly refused: the Bodyguard rule needs a WARBOSS and Bigboss lacks the keyword. Exposed a real adjacent bug (the Starting Strength 20 gate was ignored), which was fixed.
suggestion: Two leaders on a 20-Boy mob does not work for Bigboss + Weirdboy

note: The 4++ comes from the Weavefield crest; Teleport grants Deep Strike. The two are mutually exclusive. Data matches source.
suggestion: No 4++ save when taking the Teleport crest

note: Three of four are gated to Memnyr Strategist in the source data; Graviton Vault is ungated and is offered.
suggestion: Hearthfyre Arsenal enhancements missing for the Brokhyr

note: Correct. The 11e datasheet reads 'Every Boy is equipped with: 1 slugga; 1 shoota; 1 choppa'; the entry still carried the 10e split into two mutually exclusive bodies. Merged into one Boy with all three. Big shoota/rokkit bodies and their max-2 cap left as reported.
suggestion: The new Boyz can have both shoota and slugga and choppa

note: Correct. Icon of Khorne was confined to the base chainblade Berzerker, so an all-special-weapon mob couldn't take it. Moved the toggle to the always-present Champion (cap-safe; unitMax is per-model and the Champion is exactly 1), so the icon is available regardless of trooper loadout - the report explicitly accepts the champion as a valid carrier. True any-model placement would need a cross-model option cap (code), deferred to avoid a cap-bypass.
suggestion: Icon of Khorne must be on a regular Berserker; should be any Berserker (incl. champion) regardless of weapons

note: Correct. The Xenophase-blade Veteran had min:1 as a flat model, forcing a 6th model into the 5-man default and pricing it as a 10-man (190). Flat models can't be min:0 (defaultCounts uses M.min||1), so restructured the six models into an isGroup (5-10) and set the Xenophase model min:0/max:0 + unitScaleAt:10/unitScaleMax:1 (10-model only). Default now 5 models / 100pts.
suggestion: Decimus Kill Team defaults to 6 models (Xenophase-blade model) and prices the 5-man as a 10-man

note: Correct. The plasma-pistol trooper model was capped at max:1 with no scaling; the source grants +1 at 10 models. Added unitScaleAt:10/unitScaleMax:2 (matching Sternguard and other 10-model squads). Applies only to the Jump Packs unit; the base Assault Intercessor Squad correctly has no trooper plasma model.
suggestion: Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs should get a 2nd plasma pistol at 10 models

note: Correct. The demo charge sat on the Navis Sergeant-at-Arms (not a Navis Armsman); BSData binds it to the 9-Armsmen group, 1 per unit. Removed it from the Sergeant, added the toggle to all five Armsman variants, and pooled to 1 via a weapKeys capGroup on the group.
suggestion: Any Navis Armsman should be able to take the demolition charge

note: Correct. The Watch Sergeant (the kill team's leader; there is no separate Watch Captain datasheet) was missing its combi-weapon and Xenophase-blade loadouts. Added Boltgun+Xenophase, Combi+power, Combi+Xenophase per deathwatch.cat. The two Astartes-shield loadouts are deferred - option-level invuln isn't computed (durability reads model-level wargearAbilities only), so shipping them would mis-state the 4++.
suggestion: Deathwatch Kill Team 'Watch Captain' missing combi-weapon and Xenophase blade loadouts

note: Correct. RTE is a Character (agents.cat, primary Character category) but had enhancements:false, so the enhancement section never rendered. Flipped to true (matches Inquisitor/Navigator/Watch Master). Note: the reported Veiled Blade detachment's enhancements are all Assassin-restricted so RTE still shows none there; the fix delivers options in detachments like Imperialis Fleet (Voidfarers-keyed).
suggestion: Rogue Trader Entourage should be able to take enhancements
